title: Ask HN: If OpenAI hacked HuggingFace, why aren't OpenAI prosecuted?
excerpt: Hugging Face put up a blogpost saying that they reported the hacking to the authorities: https://huggingface.co/blog/security-incident-july-2026
content_html:
Ask HN: If OpenAI hacked HuggingFace, why aren't OpenAI prosecuted?
27 points by sam_lowry_ 23 hours ago | hide | past | favorite | 33 comments

Hugging Face put up a blogpost saying that they reported the hacking to the authorities: https://huggingface.co/blog/security-incident-july-2026

It's not clear whether they mean authorities for their US HQ or the French authorities.

But I can't find any announcement of the follow-up. Is there a case open against OpenAI the company? Is their management interviewed by the authorities? Anyone detained yet?

I guess the people who left the model running unattended risk at least a suspended sentence here in France.

Where are concerned citizens making inquiries on this matter and reporting in their viral blogposts?

 help

sentences.zh: 问 HN：如果 OpenAI 攻击了 HuggingFace，为什么 OpenAI 没有被起诉？27 分 by sam_lowry_ 23 小时前 |隐藏 |过去|最喜欢 | 33条评论Hugging Face发博文表示，他们向当局报告了此次黑客攻击事件：https://huggingface.co/blog/security-incident-july-2026尚不清楚他们指的是美国总部当局还是法国当局。但我找不到任何后续公告。

sentences.en: Is there a case open against OpenAI the company?
sentences.zh: 是否有针对 OpenAI 公司的案件正在审理中？

sentences.en: Is their management interviewed by the authorities?
sentences.zh: 他们的管理层是否受到当局约谈？

sentences.en: Anyone detained yet?I guess the people who left the model running unattended risk at least a suspended sentence here in France.Where are concerned citizens making inquiries on this matter and reporting in their viral blogposts?
sentences.zh: 有人被拘留了吗？我猜那些让模型无人看管的人在法国至少面临被判缓刑的风险。有关此事的公民在哪里询问此事并在他们的病毒式博文中进行举报？
